{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 268 officially classifies the rape of an unconscious or intoxicated person as a violent felony.",
    "Prosecutors could only charge perpetrators who raped an unconscious person as a misdemeanor before Senate Bill 268.",
    "Senate Bill 268 ensures that perpetrators of rape against unconscious individuals are held accountable and charged with a felony.",
    "Rape of an unconscious person is being treated as a lesser offense by the legal system without Senate Bill 268.",
    "SB 268 is viewed as a major advancement in public safety by law enforcement leaders across California.",
